flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Skidmore College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($34.7k → $40.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Skidmore College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.3k → $67.3k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Skidmore College are 48% above 6-year earnings ($46.9k → $69.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Skidmore College fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.2%).
